cms.contentitemcommondata.ContentItemCommonDataVisualBuilderWidget:
{"editableAreas":[{"identifier":"PublicSpeaking","sections":[{"identifier":"0d1fc2a2-4b1f-4fae-8f48-65cfc5b1f754","type":"Goldfinch.ContentSection","properties":{"sectionID":"","sectionName":""},"zones":[{"identifier":"bad67f0f-1b8c-4c89-aedc-c537318d9011","widgets":[{"identifier":"09d90240-a95b-431f-a6d5-9e830c7b9a71","type":"Kentico.Widget.RichText","variants":[{"identifier":"715104fb-8dff-443d-832f-01963e97df55","properties":{"content":"

I've had the privilege of speaking at industry conferences, meetups, and user groups — from Kentico's annual conferences to local tech meetups. I focus on topics that help developers and teams build better digital experiences.

"},"fieldIdentifiers":{"content":"d2aed4af-8bfe-4f8b-9d16-84f5b15cd075"}}]}]}],"fieldIdentifiers":{"sectionID":"bab7c4d5-037a-48da-8cc8-7704481603fc","sectionName":"c3ed4e67-dcdc-49d9-bb67-17cbef08ef89"}}]}]}
